## Description

<!-- What does this PR do and why? Be concise. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] `test` — Tests only
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — Build, config, tooling
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD pipeline
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement

## Related Documents

<!-- Link PDR, ADR, User Story, or spec if applicable -->

- User Story: <!-- docs/stories/... -->
- ADR: <!-- docs/decisions/... -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` — zero errors
- [ ] `npm run lint` — zero errors
- [ ] `npm run format:check` — no formatting issues
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` — all tests pass, thresholds met
- [ ] Database migrations created if schema changed (`npx prisma migrate dev`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if applicable
